item.name: Karvarichthys
item.description:
This looming wavekin has inhabited the depths of Karvarhur the First since ancient times, remaining, for the most part, unchanged.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 3 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The Yok Huy creation myth speaks of a spirit guide appearing in the form of a giant wavekin. Given its size and ancient lineage, scholars believe this fish may have some connection to the legend.
